name: Love Letter
short_description: Move the love letter, collect the sweet words scattered around the classroom, and send your feelings to that girl! Love letter creation love simulation action game “LoveLetter”
detailed_description:
Move the love letter, collect the sweet words scattered around the classroom, and send your feelings to that girl!

This game is an action game where you operate a love letter and collect items in the field.

System:

  • The player controls the love letter.

  • Love letters can be captured by hitting the object displayed in the speech bubble in the field.

  • Complete the perfect love letter for your heroine from the words in the field

Words will be added to the love letter when you hit the object displayed in the speech bubble.

Features :

  • Unique love letter wording

  • Various endings depending on the love letter

Being a high school student is an emotional time.

Write a love letter appropriate for each girl who has her own troubles and convey your feelings to them.

If it goes well, I'm happy, and if it doesn't, it might be interesting.

How you end up is up to you.

Enjoy the nostalgic atmosphere and surreal laughter.

Others :

  • Allow game distribution. Please Stream it!

  • The second heroine does not have a voice..

Update: 2024/11

  • The third heroine has been added! 

  • Shindo Kotoha 3D Model Update

  • Player health has been abolished.

  • We have moved the text count UI for love letters from the top-right to the top-left.
